statements.__comment__: Step 1: mark nodes currently labeled AzureContainerInstance (the container group in the old schema) with a temporary label so they can be distinguished from the soon-to-be-renamed individual containers.
Step 2: rename nodes currently labeled AzureGroupContainer (the individual container in the old schema) to AzureContainerInstance, which now labels the individual container.
Step 3: promote the temporary label to AzureGroupContainer, which now labels the container group.
Cleanup: strip stale :Container from AzureGroupContainer. Groups never carry :Container under the new schema; this removes the label from any node that had it before the fad226c8 cleanup ran.
